subject.description: A dead-serious marketer in a casual crewneck sweater.
subject.action: Staring intensely directly into the camera lens with a look of absolute frustration.

setting.location: A blurry, generic modern office background.

composition.framing: Centered tight portrait. MUST follow cropping rules: never cut in flesh, leave perfect clear headspace above the subject's hair, and give the chin ample breathing room.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Extremely low depth of field, meaning the background is completely indistinguishable blur.

lighting.type: Natural, slightly moody window light hitting one side of the face.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear in the image: smiling, happy, fake stock photo vibe, text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, cartoon, illustration, low quality, cut flesh, badly cropped head.
